# Synthetic typosquatting fixture. Names below are deliberately misspelled
# to exercise Layer 4. DO NOT install this file.

# Direct one-character typos (distance 1) — should be HIGH severity findings.
requets==2.31.0
numpyy>=1.24
torcch==2.1.0

# Two-character typos (distance 2) — should be MEDIUM severity.
pythhorch==2.0.0

# Legitimate, exact-match dependency — must NOT be flagged.
pillow>=10.0

# Pip directives + URLs should be ignored gracefully.
--index-url https://pypi.org/simple
-r ./other-requirements.txt
git+https://github.com/example/repo.git@main

# A non-canonical-but-valid form with extras should still resolve to the
# normalized name. `requests[security]` is genuine; we expect no finding.
requests[security]>=2.30
